title: Wave 2: archive directory infrastructure for retired schemas/instances
description: Establishes the archive directory pattern for retired schemas and instances. When a schema reaches status=retired (per deprecation-header convention from sibling Wave 2 deliverable), it moves to an archive location with audit metadata preserved. Defines the archive directory path convention, the archive-manifest schema (what archived items get tagged with), and the move-to-archive workflow. Does not retire any schemas in this deliverable; it builds the infrastructure.

outputs.description: Create schemas/_archive/ directory with .gitkeep; add to .refsignore so archived schemas don't trigger registry rebuild.

Author schemas/archive-manifest.schema.json defining what metadata an archived schema carries: archivedDate, archivedFrom (original path), retiredDeliverable (the d-* id that retired it), supersededBy (optional), retentionPolicy.

preMerge: ajv-cli@5 validates this DELIVERABLE.json instance against deliverable.schema.json v1.0.0
postMerge: Sibling Wave 2 deliverable d-2026-06-04 unblocked to move venture-summary instances

transitions.trigger: Wave 2 child spec authored alongside parent and siblings

notes: Infrastructure-only; no schemas retired in this deliverable. Sibling d-2026-06-04 uses this infrastructure to archive 7 venture-summary instances. Single-repo scope; greenfield directory + schema.
